creator: marcus@marcuscom.com
text:
The problem _is_ related to localization.  Currently, Mozilla 0.9.7 
only supports the US locale.  New locales can be downloaded from 
http://www.mozilla.org/projects/l10n/mlp_status.html#contrib, but 
German is not yet available.

Setting the locale to C or en_US.ISO_8859-1 works around the problem 
until a localization oackage becomes available.  This PR could probably 
be closed.

Joe
